examples: She overslept and missed the flight.
She overslept because she had a headache.
Sorry, I overslept. I forgot to set the alarm clock.
Her approach to alcohol changed when she overslept on Christmas morning while her children were unwrapping their presents.
Jim Furyk overslept and missed his pro-am tee time at last year's Barclays and was disqualified from the actual tournament (the PGA Tour has since modified the rule).
